# Copilot Instructions

- **Stack snapshot**: Next.js 16 (app router); Drizzle ORM + Postgres; Tailwind/Shadcn UI + Base UI primitives; custom auth (no NextAuth) implemented under `src/features/core/auth`; i18n/RTL helpers under `src/features/core/i18n`; runs under `npm` with Biome for lint/format.
- **Dev + quality commands**: `npm run dev` (Next dev with turbo), `npm run build`/`npm run preview`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run check` (Biome read-only) or `npm run check:write`/`check:unsafe` to auto-fix. Seeds live in `src/drizzle/seed` (run `npm run seed` or `seed:all`/`seed:clear`).
- **Database**: Drizzle config in [drizzle.config.ts](drizzle.config.ts) targets Postgres with schema entry point [src/drizzle/schema.ts](src/drizzle/schema.ts) (re-exports feature schemas incl. auth tables). Connection is cached in [src/drizzle/index.ts](src/drizzle/index.ts) for HMR. Migrations via `npm run db:generate|migrate|push|drop|studio`; docker DB via `npm run db:start` and `npm run db:reset`.
- **Env wiring**: Server env is validated in [src/env/server.ts](src/env/server.ts); provide DB_HOST/DB_PORT/DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD/DB_NAME and it derives DATABASE_URL. Also requires BASE_URL, OAUTH_REDIRECT_URL_BASE, JWT_SECRET_KEY (>=32 chars), OAuth client IDs/secrets, and email SMTP settings. Client env is empty by design [src/env/client.ts](src/env/client.ts).
- **Auth/session**: Auth actions live in [src/features/core/auth/nextjs/actions/auth.ts](src/features/core/auth/nextjs/actions/auth.ts) (and related files under `src/features/core/auth/nextjs/actions`). Sessions are HMAC-JWT cookies keyed `session-id` in [src/features/core/auth/core/session.ts](src/features/core/auth/core/session.ts). `getAuth()` is exported from [src/features/core/auth/nextjs/actions/index.ts](src/features/core/auth/nextjs/actions/index.ts). Current-user helpers live in [src/features/core/auth/nextjs/currentUser.ts](src/features/core/auth/nextjs/currentUser.ts) and use Drizzle.
- **Permissions**: Permission helpers live in [src/features/core/auth/core/permissions.ts](src/features/core/auth/core/permissions.ts) and are imported via `hasPermission(...)`. UI menus and protected server logic should rely on this helper.
- **Auth types/data**: Primary auth tables are under [src/features/core/auth/tables](src/features/core/auth/tables). These are re-exported via [src/drizzle/schema.ts](src/drizzle/schema.ts).
- **API layer**: Prefer Next.js server actions for all app mutations and request flows. tRPC is being deprecated in this repo and should not be expanded.
- **App providers**: [src/app/_providers/index.tsx](src/app/_providers/index.tsx) wraps the tree with TranslationProvider, AuthProvider (`getAuth()`), ThemeProvider, DirectionProvider, NuqsAdapter, and Sonner Toaster. Root layout [src/app/layout.tsx](src/app/layout.tsx) sets fonts and RTL/LTR dir based on locale.
- **i18n**: i18n utilities live under `src/features/core/i18n` (not `src/lib/i18n`). Client provider is [src/features/core/i18n/useTranslation.tsx](src/features/core/i18n/useTranslation.tsx) and server actions include `getT`.
- **UI conventions**: Components follow Shadcn patterns under [src/components/ui](src/components/ui); use Base UI instead of Radix UI for new and migrated primitives. many primitives expect `className` merging via `cn` from [src/lib/utils.ts](src/lib/utils.ts). Sidebar/menu code uses `WrapWithTooltip` for truncated labels and respects collapsible rail vs full sidebar states.
- **Data table standard**: Keep data table APIs aligned with tablecn patterns from `sadmann7/tablecn` while adapting to this repo's module boundaries.
- **Forms standard**: Continue migration to TanStack Form; avoid introducing or re-introducing react-hook-form patterns in new edits.
- **i18n typed keys**: Keep typed translation keys strict; when `t(...)` reports a missing key, add the key in the feature-local translation files and ensure it is merged into the main `en` and `ar` translation maps.
- **Legacy server folder**: The top-level `server/` directory is deprecated and excluded from type checking as a temporary migration step. Port its behavior to server actions under `src/` and remove it later.
- **Client auth usage**: In client components, call `useAuth()` from [src/features/core/auth/nextjs/components/auth-provider.tsx](src/features/core/auth/nextjs/components/auth-provider.tsx). For server actions requiring auth, use `getCurrentUser(...)` from [src/features/core/auth/nextjs/currentUser.ts](src/features/core/auth/nextjs/currentUser.ts).
- **Internationalized UX**: When changing locale on the client, `useTranslation` updates document `dir` immediately and triggers `setLocaleCookie` in a transition to avoid UI stalls.
- **General patterns**: Avoid NextAuth assumptions; sessions are custom. Keep database access through Drizzle `db` from drizzle/index. Prefer server actions for mutations (auth/i18n) and for API; ensure new routes/components respect locale and permission checks. Use the temporary marker `//TRPC PLEASE FIX` only for intentionally deferred migration placeholders.
- **Agent workflow base**: Repo-local playbook lives in `.github/agent/README.md` (see also `workflow.md`, `planning.md`, `verification.md`).
